series_metadata.series_description: Reports on the findings which support the workpapers of an insurance exam of a company''s compliance.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy until electronic, then destroy hard copy. Retain electronic 10 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain hard copy until electronic, then destroy hard copy. Retain electronic 10 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
